headline: Why Veralto (VLTO) Has a Liquid-Cooling Reliability Angle Through ChemTreat’s Dow Partnership
summary: Veralto Corporation (NYSE:VLTO) is one of the best water infrastructure stocks to buy as AI data centers strain resources. On May 18, 2026, ChemTreat, a Veralto operating company, joined Dow’s newly launched Coolant Care Network as a strategic national service provider for AI data center cooling and as Dow’s only preferred service provider in Virginia. […]
